tasks.name: Create activity enums in schema file
tasks.purpose: Define PostgreSQL enums for type-safe activity and entity types

constraints: Must include all 6 activity types from spec
Must include all 5 entity types from spec

tasks.input_state: No schema file exists. Existing enum patterns found in apps/web/supabase/schemas/01-enums.sql.
tasks.output_state: Schema file exists with activity_type enum (lesson_complete, quiz_submit, presentation_create, presentation_update, assessment_complete, coaching_booked) and entity_type enum (lesson, quiz, presentation, assessment, coaching_session).
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Schema file contains both enums with correct values and SQL comments documenting their purpose.

tasks.name: Create user_activities table with columns
tasks.purpose: Define table schema for storing user activity events with proper constraints and relationships
tasks.input_state: Schema file exists with enums defined. Table creation patterns available in apps/web/supabase/schemas/03-accounts.sql.
tasks.output_state: user_activities table defined with 8 columns (id, account_id, user_id, activity_type, entity_type, entity_id, metadata, created_at) and proper foreign key constraints.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Table definition includes all columns with correct types, foreign keys to accounts and auth.users, and JSONB metadata field with default empty object.

tasks.name: Add RLS policies for user_activities

action.target: RLS policies for SELECT and INSERT

tasks.purpose: Implement row-level security to ensure users can only view and record their own activities

constraints: Must use subquery pattern for performance
Must create separate policies for SELECT and INSERT
No UPDATE or DELETE policies (immutable audit trail)

tasks.input_state: user_activities table defined. RLS patterns available in apps/web/supabase/migrations/20250221144500_web_create_kanban_tables.sql and feature spec.
tasks.output_state: RLS enabled on user_activities table with two policies: users_view_own_activities (SELECT) and users_record_own_activities (INSERT), both using subquery pattern.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: RLS is enabled and two policies exist allowing users to SELECT where user_id = (select auth.uid()) and INSERT with same check, no UPDATE or DELETE policies.

tasks.name: Add performance indexes
tasks.purpose: Create indexes on frequently queried columns to ensure fast activity feed and dashboard queries

constraints: Must include indexes on account_id, user_id, created_at DESC
Must include composite index on (account_id, created_at DESC)

tasks.input_state: user_activities table defined. Index patterns available in apps/web/supabase/migrations/20250221144500_web_create_kanban_tables.sql.
tasks.output_state: Five indexes created: idx_user_activities_account (account_id), idx_user_activities_user (user_id), idx_user_activities_created (created_at DESC), idx_user_activities_account_created (account_id, created_at DESC), idx_user_activities_entity (entity_type, entity_id).
tasks.acceptance_criterion: All five indexes are defined with appropriate naming convention (idx_user_activities_*) and correct column specifications.

tasks.name: Add grants and permissions
tasks.purpose: Configure table permissions to allow authenticated users to query and insert activity records

dependencies: Grant patterns from 03-accounts.sql and tasks migration
constraints: Must grant SELECT and INSERT to authenticated
No UPDATE or DELETE grants (immutable audit trail)

tasks.input_state: user_activities table defined. Grant patterns available in apps/web/supabase/schemas/03-accounts.sql.
tasks.output_state: Permissions configured: all revoked from authenticated and service_role, then SELECT and INSERT granted to authenticated role.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Schema includes revoke statement removing all permissions, followed by grant statement allowing only SELECT and INSERT to authenticated users.

tasks.name: Generate migration from schema
tasks.purpose: Create migration file that can be version controlled and applied to other environments
tasks.input_state: Complete schema file exists at apps/web/supabase/schemas/18-user-activities.sql. Existing migrations directory with other migration files.
tasks.output_state: New migration file created in apps/web/supabase/migrations/ with timestamp prefix and name create_user_activities_table.sql containing the schema changes.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Migration file exists in migrations directory with correct naming pattern and contains user_activities table definition.

tasks.name: Apply migration to database
tasks.purpose: Execute migration to create user_activities table in the database

constraints: Must use pnpm --filter web supabase migration up
Must verify Supabase is running first

tasks.input_state: Migration file created. Local Supabase instance running. Database does not have user_activities table.
tasks.output_state: Migration applied successfully. user_activities table exists in public schema with all columns, RLS policies, and indexes.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Migration command succeeds and table query returns structure showing all expected columns and constraints.
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web supabase db dump --schema public | grep -A 20 'CREATE TABLE.*user_activities'

tasks.name: Generate TypeScript types
tasks.purpose: Create type-safe TypeScript interfaces for user_activities table to use in application code

constraints: Must verify enums are typed correctly

tasks.input_state: user_activities table exists in database. database.types.ts exists but does not include user_activities types.
tasks.output_state: database.types.ts updated with UserActivities table type, activity_type enum, and entity_type enum.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: database.types.ts contains user_activities in Database['public']['Tables'] and both enums in Database['public']['Enums'].
